name: afd-ads-pro-saas
description: A.F.D Ads Pro SaaS - plataforma multiusuario de analytics e monetizacao para Shopee Ads.

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --workspace server" "npm run dev --workspace client"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace client && npm run build --workspace server
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace client && npm run lint --workspace server
